summary: A historical-studies index for manuscript, diplomacy, war theory, international law, peacebuilding, and operational case pages.
final_use_case: It makes the portfolio legible as applied historical reasoning: some pages are manuscripts, some are legal or diplomatic analyses, and some are scenario-based operational case studies.

instruments.downstream_use: Feeds reader-facing definition of the software object and its intended user; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: reader-facing definition of the software object and its intended user
instruments.status: Status: The eleven historical and operational study pages are represented here as a native index. Trilogy (the flagship) is the deepest at the full manuscript.
